name: ai-study-tutor
description: AI-assisted study tutoring for verified image reading, exam-ready solutions, detailed teaching explanations, and review cards.

interface.longDescription: AI Study Tutor helps explain homework, exam questions, textbook examples, screenshots, diagrams, circuits, graphs, and formulas. It includes course references for electrical engineering, probability and statistics, and complex functions with integral transforms. It can import course PDFs, DOCX files, and notes into generated references, double-check image details before solving, answer each problem twice by giving a concise full-credit exam solution first and a deliberately detailed principle-based teaching explanation second, deliver solved problems and teaching materials as print-ready PDFs with editable DOCX files when needed, visually inspect every rendered page and LaTeX formula, add visual aids, preprocess hard-to-read images, create review cards, schedule spaced review, and export Anki-ready CSV cards.
defaultPrompt: Use $ai-study-tutor to solve this problem twice: exam answer first, teaching explanation second.
Use $ai-study-tutor to analyze this image question and check the details twice.
Use $ai-study-tutor to create review cards and tell me what to review today.
